title: Warm Audiobook Sample From Chapter Excerpt

prompt.text: Turn this chapter excerpt into a calm audiobook sample with a warm narrator voice. Keep it short and send me an MP3.

attachments.name: chapter-03-sample.pdf
attachments.summary: Seven-page public-domain fiction excerpt, roughly 1,840 words.

clarifyingQuestions.question: Should the narrator use neutral US English, neutral Indian English, or a British audiobook style?
clarifyingQuestions.answer: Neutral US English, warm but not dramatic.
clarifyingQuestions.reason: Voice selection changes the external audio generation request and credit estimate.

approvedPlan.clarifiedGoal: Generate a short MP3 audiobook sample from the uploaded excerpt using a warm neutral-US narrator voice.
permissions: Write generated audio and metadata artifacts
Call approved text-to-speech API within spend cap
steps: Extract text from the uploaded PDF and remove headers, page numbers, and repeated footers.
Select the first complete passage that fits the sample length cap.
Generate audio with the approved narrator voice settings.
Normalize loudness and export an MP3 preview.
Create transcript and metadata JSON with voice settings, duration, and usage.
Upload artifacts and notify the user when ready.
assumptions: The uploaded excerpt is user-owned or public-domain text.
A short sample is enough; this job will not convert the full book.
MP3 at 128 kbps is acceptable for mobile preview.
risks: PDF extraction may include stray page furniture if the source scan is noisy.
Text-to-speech pronunciation may need a later pronunciation pass for names.

milestones.message: Extracted 1,812 usable words from the uploaded PDF.
Generated narration preview with the approved voice settings.
Normalized audio and uploaded the MP3 artifact.

result.summary: Created a 3 minute 42 second warm narrator audiobook sample from the uploaded chapter excerpt.
followUpSuggestions: Approve a pronunciation pass for character names.
Generate a second sample with a more dramatic delivery.
